about.heroSubtitle: A leading cryptocurrency exchange that makes trading digital assets simple, secure and accessible to everyone
about.historyP1: CryptoX was founded in 2020 by a team of blockchain enthusiasts and experienced financiers. Our goal is to build a reliable and convenient cryptocurrency trading platform accessible to everyone.
about.historyP2: Over four years we grew from a small startup into one of the leading exchanges in the region. Today more than 2 million users worldwide trust us.
about.historyP3: We keep evolving, adding new features and improving security to give our users the best cryptocurrency trading experience.
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to modern financial tools. Our mission is to make cryptocurrency trading simple, secure and accessible to all, regardless of experience or location.
about.value1Desc: Protecting users' funds is our top priority
about.value2Desc: Continuous development and adoption of new technologies
about.value3Desc: Honesty and openness in everything we do
about.value4Desc: We build the platform together with our users
about.joinSubtitle: Become part of the largest cryptocurrency community

chat.greeting: Hello! Welcome to CryptoX support. How can I help?
chat.defaultReply: Thank you for your message! Our specialist will reply soon. Average response time: 2-5 minutes.
chat.a1:
To top up your balance:
1. Go to the 'Wallet' section
2. Choose a cryptocurrency or fiat currency
3. Click 'Deposit'
4. Follow the instructions

We support: bank cards, bank transfers and crypto deposits.
chat.a2:
To withdraw funds:
1. Go to the 'Wallet' section
2. Choose a cryptocurrency
3. Click 'Withdraw'
4. Enter the wallet address and amount
5. Confirm the operation via 2FA

Processing takes 10-30 minutes for crypto and 1-3 days for fiat.
chat.a3:
To complete verification:
1. Go to 'Profile' → 'Verification'
2. Fill in your personal data
3. Upload a photo of your document (passport or ID)
4. Upload a selfie with the document

Review takes 1-24 hours. After verification the withdrawal limit increases to $500,000/day.
chat.enterHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Your security is our priority
security.f1Desc: Protect your account with an extra layer of security via Google Authenticator or SMS
security.f2Desc: 95% of user funds are stored in offline cold wallets, inaccessible to hackers
security.f3Desc: Use fingerprint or Face ID to sign in to the mobile app
security.f4Desc: User funds are insured up to $1 billion against hacking and fraud
security.f5Desc: Tracking of all logins and suspicious actions with instant notifications
security.f6Desc: Allow withdrawals only to pre-approved cryptocurrency addresses
security.p1: Use a unique and strong password (at least 12 characters)
security.p2: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) via Google Authenticator
security.p3: Never share your password, 2FA code or private keys
security.p4: Regularly check login history in security settings
security.p5: Use antivirus software and avoid public Wi-Fi networks
security.p6: Enable Email and SMS notifications for all operations
security.p7: Create an address whitelist for withdrawals
security.p8: Do not click suspicious links in emails
security.ph1: CryptoX will never ask you to share your password, 2FA code or private keys
security.ph2pre: Always check the site URL: only
security.ph3: Beware of fake apps in the App Store and Google Play
security.ph4: Do not click links in suspicious emails or SMS
security.ph5: When in doubt, contact official support

bugBounty.subtitle: Found a vulnerability? Get a reward up to $10,000
bugBounty.whatText: Bug Bounty is a reward program for discovering vulnerabilities in the CryptoX security system. We invite security researchers to help make our platform safer.
bugBounty.look1Text: SQL injections, remote code execution, access to user funds
bugBounty.rule1: ✓ Do not disclose a vulnerability publicly until it is fixed
bugBounty.rule2: ✓ Do not access other users' data
bugBounty.howHeading: Send an email to crypto.x.kilka@gmail.com with a description:
bugBounty.howStep2: 2. How to reproduce it (step by step)
bugBounty.faq1Q: When will I receive the reward?
bugBounty.faq1A: After review and fixing of the vulnerability (usually 1-2 weeks). Payment is made in USDT or Bitcoin.
bugBounty.faq2A: Yes, we respect your privacy. You can use a pseudonym.
bugBounty.faq3Q: What if the vulnerability is already known?
bugBounty.faq3A: The reward goes to the first person who reported the problem. We will notify you within 24 hours.

glossary.title: Cryptocurrency glossary
glossary.subtitle: A complete reference of terms and concepts in the crypto world
glossary.notFound: No terms found. Try changing your search parameters.
glossary.t1Def: A distributed database that stores transaction information as sequential blocks linked cryptographically.
glossary.t2Def: The first and most popular cryptocurrency, created in 2009 by the pseudonymous Satoshi Nakamoto as a decentralized digital currency.
glossary.t3Def: Any cryptocurrency that is not Bitcoin. Examples: Ethereum, Ripple, Litecoin.
glossary.t4Def: A software or hardware device for storing private keys and managing cryptocurrency assets.
glossary.t5Def: A secret cryptographic code that gives access to your crypto assets. Losing the private key means losing access to funds.
glossary.t6Def: A cryptographic address that can be safely shared with others to receive payments.
glossary.t7Def: The process of confirming transactions and adding new blocks to the blockchain using computing power. Miners receive rewards in cryptocurrency.
glossary.t8Def: The process of locking cryptocurrency to support the blockchain network and earn rewards.
glossary.t9Def: A self-executing contract whose terms are written in blockchain code and automatically executed when conditions are met.
glossary.t10Def: Decentralized finance - blockchain-based financial services without traditional intermediaries.
glossary.t11Def: Non-fungible token - a unique digital asset representing ownership of a specific item or content.
glossary.t12Def: Fear Of Missing Out - a psychological effect that pushes investors to buy at the peak price.
glossary.t13Def: Fear, Uncertainty and Doubt - spreading negative information to manipulate the market.
glossary.t14Def: A long-term cryptocurrency holding strategy regardless of price fluctuations. Originates from a typo of the word 'hold'.
glossary.t15Def: A platform for buying, selling and exchanging cryptocurrencies.
glossary.t16Def: The total market value of a cryptocurrency, calculated as the price of one coin multiplied by the number of coins in circulation.
glossary.t17Def: The degree of price variability of an asset. Cryptocurrencies are known for high volatility.
glossary.t18Def: Storing cryptocurrency in an offline wallet not connected to the internet for maximum security.
glossary.t19Def: A crypto wallet connected to the internet, convenient for frequent transactions but less secure.
glossary.t20Def: A fee for executing transactions on the Ethereum blockchain and other networks.
glossary.t21Def: A consensus algorithm that requires solving complex mathematical problems to confirm transactions.
glossary.t22Def: A consensus algorithm where validators are selected based on the number of coins held.
glossary.t23Def: A manipulative scheme of artificially inflating an asset's price followed by mass selling.
glossary.t24Def: A technical document describing the concept, technology and roadmap of a crypto project.

support.title: Help center
support.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions
support.q1: How to create an account on CryptoX?
support.a1: To create an account, click 'Sign up' in the top right corner, fill in the form with your email and password, confirm your email and complete basic verification.
support.q2: How to top up the balance?
support.a2: Go to the 'Wallet' section, choose a cryptocurrency or fiat currency, click 'Deposit' and follow the instructions. We support bank cards, bank transfers and crypto deposits.
support.a3: Trading fees start from 0.1% per trade. Withdrawal fees depend on the chosen cryptocurrency and withdrawal method. See the 'Fees' page for details.
support.q4: How long does a withdrawal take?
support.a4: Crypto withdrawals are processed within 10-30 minutes. Fiat withdrawals to a bank card take 1-3 business days.
support.a5: 2FA is an extra layer of protection for your account. After entering your password, a code from Google Authenticator or SMS is required. We strongly recommend enabling 2FA in security settings.
support.a6: Go to 'Profile' → 'Verification', upload an identity document (passport or ID card) and a selfie with the document. Review usually takes 1-24 hours.
support.q7: What to do if I forgot my password?
support.a7: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send you a password reset link.
support.a8: Yes! You can buy and sell cryptocurrency directly with other users through our P2P marketplace with escrow protection.
support.a9: Go to 'Wallet', choose a cryptocurrency, click 'Withdraw', enter the wallet address and amount, confirm via 2FA. Check the network (ERC20, TRC20, etc.) before sending.
support.q10: Which documents are needed for verification?
support.a10: Accepted for verification: passport (domestic or international), national ID card. The document must be valid with all data clearly visible.
support.a11: Go to 'Settings' → 'Security' → 'Two-factor authentication'. Download Google Authenticator, scan the QR code and enter the confirmation code.
support.q12: What are Maker and Taker fees?
support.a12: Maker — a fee for creating a limit order (adding liquidity). Taker — a fee for executing a market order (taking liquidity). Maker fees are usually lower.
support.a13: Go to the 'Trading' section, choose a trading pair (e.g. BTC/USDT), enter the price and amount, choose the order type (limit or market) and click 'Buy' or 'Sell'.
support.q14: What are withdrawal limits without verification?
support.a14: Withdrawal is not possible without verification. With basic verification (Email + documents) — up to $50,000/day. With full verification — up to $500,000/day.
support.q15: How to change email or phone number?
support.a15: Go to 'Settings' → 'Security', click 'Change email/phone', confirm via your old email/phone and 2FA code, then enter the new details.
support.q16: Is there a minimum amount for trading?
support.a16: The minimum trade amount depends on the trading pair and is usually from 10 USDT. Exact limits are shown on each trading pair's page.
support.q17: How to protect my account from hacking?
support.a17: Enable 2FA, use a strong unique password, add an address whitelist for withdrawals, enable email/SMS notifications for all operations, do not click suspicious links.
support.q18: Is there a fee for deposits?
support.a18: No, account deposits (by cryptocurrency, card or bank transfer) are completely free. Fees apply only to withdrawals and trading.
support.q19: What to do if I sent funds to the wrong address?
support.a19: Unfortunately, cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible. If you sent funds to the wrong address, we cannot return them. Always carefully check the address before sending.
support.q20: How does staking work on CryptoX?
support.a20: Go to 'Staking', choose a cryptocurrency and term (flexible or fixed), enter the amount. Rewards are credited daily. Flexible staking lets you withdraw funds at any time.
support.notFound: No questions found. Try changing your search parameters.
support.ctaTitle: Didn't find an answer to your question?
support.ctaSubtitle: Our support team is ready to help you 24/7

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.noticeText: By using the CryptoX platform, you agree to these terms of use. If you do not agree with any provisions, please do not use our services.
terms.s1p1: This User Agreement (the "Agreement") governs the use of the CryptoX platform and all related services.
terms.s1p2: CryptoX Limited (the "Company", "we", "us") provides an online platform for trading cryptocurrencies and digital assets.
terms.s1p3: The Agreement takes effect upon registration on the platform or the start of using any of our services.
terms.s2i1: You must be at least 18 years old to use the platform
terms.s2i2: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration
terms.s2i3: You are responsible for keeping your password and login data safe
terms.s2i4: Creating more than one account per user is prohibited
terms.s2i5: We reserve the right to refuse registration without explanation
terms.s3p1: In accordance with international requirements for anti-money laundering (AML) and counter-terrorism financing (CFT), we are required to verify users' identities.
terms.s3p2: To complete verification you need to provide:
terms.s3i1: • An identity document (passport or ID card)
terms.s3i2: • Proof of residential address (no older than 3 months)
terms.s3p3: Without verification, platform functionality will be limited.
terms.s4p1: Trading on the platform is carried out under the conditions specified on the website:
terms.s4i3: Withdrawals — fees according to the rates on the "Fees" page
terms.s4i4: We reserve the right to change fees with prior notice
terms.s5p1: When using the platform, the following is strictly prohibited:
terms.s5i2: Fraud and use of other people's documents
terms.s5i4: Using bots and automated systems without permission
terms.s5i5: Violation of the laws of any jurisdiction
terms.s6p1: Trading cryptocurrencies involves high risks, including:
terms.s6p2: The Company is not responsible for your trading decisions and their results. We do not provide investment advice.
terms.s7p1: We reserve the right to change this Agreement at any time. All changes take effect upon publication on the website. By continuing to use the platform after changes are made, you agree to the new terms.
terms.s8p1: For questions related to the terms of use, contact:
terms.s8addrValue: 010000, Republic of Kazakhstan, Astana, Abay Ave 76, bld. 1

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro1p1: Cookies are small text files saved on your device (computer, smartphone or tablet) when you visit websites. They help websites remember your actions and preferences, providing a more convenient experience.
cookies.intro1p2: CryptoX uses cookies to improve the platform, ensure security and provide a personalized experience.
cookies.typesTitle: What types of cookies we use
cookies.type1Desc: These cookies are essential for the site to work and cannot be disabled.
cookies.type2Desc: These cookies improve functionality and personalization.
cookies.type3Desc: These cookies help understand how users interact with the platform.
cookies.type3i1: • Google Analytics — traffic and user behavior analysis
cookies.type4Desc: These cookies are used to display relevant advertising.
cookies.browserDesc: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings:
cookies.firefoxText: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
cookies.warnText: Disabling necessary cookies may break the platform. Some features may become unavailable.
cookies.thirdIntro: We use third-party services that may set their own cookies:
cookies.third1Text: — for traffic and user behavior analysis
cookies.thirdNote: We do not control third-party cookies. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies.
cookies.updatesP1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. All changes will be published on this page. We recommend periodically checking this page for up-to-date information.
cookies.questionsP1: If you have questions about our use of cookies, contact us:
